name: Mixed seafood salad with anchovy dressing
intro: Most supermarkets offer packs of precooked seafood, which are handy when you need a quick family dinner. Simply throw this salad together in a large serving bowl, toss with the dressing, and let everybody help themselves.

ingredients.item: handful of mixed salad leaves, such as romaine
assorted cooked seafood, such as shelled shrimp, mussels, or squid rings, rinsed and dried
fresh hot green chile, seeded and finely chopped
handful of fresh cilantro, roughly chopped
(For the dressing) whole anchovies in oil, drained and finely chopped
(For the dressing) handful of fresh flat-leaf parsley, finely chopped
(For the dressing) salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: First, make the dressing. In a large bowl, whisk together the oil and vinegar. Add the anchovies, sugar, and parsley; season well with salt and black pepper; and whisk again.

In a bowl, toss together the salad leaves, fennel, seafood, anchovies, chile, and cilantro. Add the dressing, and toss again to coat. Place the salad into a shallow serving bowl, and serve with lemon wedges and rice noodles.
